title: Lee Ferrell
compiled_truth: Lee Ferrell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-21 to 2001-10-30), Lee Ferrell sent 6 and received 217 emails, totalling 223 interactions.
